IT Support Guide

Troubleshooting and internal IT help documentation. For urgent issues, open a ticket via the support portal.

Cannot connect to the internet

  • Check that the network cable is plugged in or Wi‑Fi is enabled.
  • Restart your router or switch if you have access.
  • Run the network troubleshooter (Windows: Settings → Network → Troubleshoot).
  • Verify VPN is disconnected when testing local network access.

Email not loading or sending

1. Check your internet connection.
2. Clear browser cache if using webmail, or restart the email client.
3. Confirm username and password; reset password via the self-service portal if needed.
4. If the issue continues, contact IT with your device and error message.

Computer running slowly

  • Close unused applications and browser tabs.
  • Restart the computer.
  • Check for pending updates (Windows Update / macOS Software Update).
  • Ensure antivirus is up to date and not stuck on a full scan.

Printer not working

  • Confirm the printer is on and paper and toner are available.
  • Check that the correct printer is selected and the print queue is not paused.
  • Remove and re-add the printer in Settings if the driver reports an error.

Password reset

Use the self-service password reset link sent by HR or available on the intranet. If you are locked out, contact the IT helpdesk with your employee ID.

For more help, open a request in the internal support system or email it-support@company.com.
